title: Outer End Wilds
description: Adds Two New End Biomes inspired by Minecraft Dungeons
body:
**THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB**  
  
Thank you all for 5,000 downloads! I'm working on making a sequel/retake of this mod here: https://www.youtube.com/@imm4xon
# Biomes
Outer End wilds adds 2 biomes to the Outer End, those being the End Wilds and Folly Fields.
## End Wilds
The well known biome from Minecraft Dungeons: Echoing Void has finally made its way into the game, with discs of End Slate, a new stone type exclusive to the end, and twisted yellow and purple trees scattered around. The End Wilds has two new flowers, those being the Twist Flower and End Lillies. Endermen spawn naturally in this biome, so keep your glares to yourself. 
![End Wilds with the Rethinking Voxels Shader Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcfddbcf5b21929f385ed4610b16504f6f4a062e_0.webp)
The biome alo includes floating islands above the canopy of the trees, with one of them including a monster spawner.
![Island #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dbe38a53befaf1aaac3f58f835798db2ffdca36_0.webp)
## Folly Fields
A mostly original biome inspired by the Folly Trees from CSMP, the Folly Fields includes a pink and white color pallete, with towering trees and discs of Marble on the ground. There is a new block called a Folly Blossom, which drops particles continuously. Watchlings spawn here naturally, which will attack unprovoked.
![Folly Fields with the Rethinking Voxels Shader Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/642e61ea63f70fbac50146790c5cff84210df08a_0.webp)
# The End Wilds Castle
The End Wilds Castle is a rare structure housing 3 powerful mobs, The Snareling, The Blastling, and the Watchling. It floats on a large island, with loot chests full of Enderite Inside.
![End Wilds Castle with Rethinking Voxels Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baf7891f2a1551b1fd23c0793d6ff46dfcda7cd7_0.webp)
# Enderite
An upgrade to Netherite, Enderite serves as the last upgrade for the player's gear. For weapons, you can either upgrade your Netherite sword to an Enderite one, but you can also craft an Obsidian Claymore, which is twice as slow, with far more damage. The choice is your's ;)
![Enderite Armor + Tools with the Rethinking Voxels Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c214df46b4e9898aebfff95303716fadb1e924e8_0.webp)
# Mobs
## The Snareling
The Snareling is a hostile enderman variant, which shoots Snareling Goop at you, which will imobolize you until its effects wear off. It will teleport away if you go in close proximity to it.
![Snareling with the Rethinking Voxels Shader Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/047c449259f2bc489a4570768f3f661dc6e04fd9_0.webp)
## The Watchling
The Watchling is a Hostile Enderman Variant, which will melee attack you unprovoked.
![The Watchling with the Rethinking Voxels Shader Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/497204989ff573a7f2c13a1755ac89ccd86cfbe9_0.webp)
## The Blastling
The Blastling is a Hostile Enderman Variant, which will attack you with Blastling Flames, which do large ammounts of knockback.
![The Blastling with the Rethinking Voxels Shader Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c37824e46bb97adfd46cab30a97204343521aab2_0.webp)
# Additional Features + Changes
Pools of End Acid now spawn in the vanilla end biomes, and end variants of iron, coal, and diamond now generate. You can make End Rod Blocks, End Stone Pillars, and End Stone Lamps. Endstone now has a variated texture, which is a recolored modification of the Vanilla Tweaks Variated Endstone pack, and Chorus Roots now spawn in all Vanilla End biomes. End Portal Frames now have an updated coloration to match the new end stone and the End Slate textures.
![Pool of End Acid with the Rethinking Voxels Shader Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3d03b90c46b7c42f9b4e5fe1c6c7da0571fd165_0.webp)
![End Iron Ore with the Rethinking Voxels Shader Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b3145e56e1afd91ec2ced7d7f9235a6c4d27329_0.webp)
![The New Main End Island with the Rethinking Voxels Shader Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f51cd4b0000cc87ef5bc41e4f59520a3013202ff_0.webp)
